title: Boss Lab: Production incident — four things are broken
scenario: ALERT: production is down. Four issues exist simultaneously: (1) the `api` Deployment has 0 replicas, (2) the `api-svc` Service selector is wrong, (3) the `db-pvc` PVC is Pending (no StorageClass), and (4) the `api-config` ConfigMap is missing the required `DB_HOST` key. Fix all four issues.
starterYaml:
# Fix all four issues below
# 1. Scale the api Deployment to 3 replicas
# 2. Fix the api-svc selector to match app: api
# 3. Create a StorageClass and PVC named db-pvc
# 4. Add DB_HOST key to the api-config ConfigMap

apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: api
  namespace: default
spec:
  replicas: 0
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: api
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: api
    spec:
      containers:
      - name: api
        image: node:20-alpine
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: api-svc
  namespace: default
spec:
  type: ClusterIP
  selector:
    app: wrong
  ports:
  - port: 80
    targetPort: 3000
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: ConfigMap
metadata:
  name: api-config
  namespace: default
data:
  APP_ENV: production

objectives.description: Deployment `api` has at least 1 ready replica
Service `api-svc` routes to at least 1 Running pod

hints.text: Start with the Deployment: change `replicas: 0` to `replicas: 3` and apply.
Fix the Service selector: change `app: wrong` to `app: api` so it can route to the Deployment pods.
For the PVC, add a StorageClass (e.g. `fast-ssd`) and a PVC named `db-pvc` with `storageClassName: fast-ssd`. Dynamic provisioning will bind it.
For the ConfigMap, add `DB_HOST: postgres-svc.default.svc.cluster.local` to the `data` section and re-apply.

solution:
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: api
  namespace: default
spec:
  replicas: 3
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: api
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: api
    spec:
      containers:
      - name: api
        image: node:20-alpine
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: api-svc
  namespace: default
spec:
  type: ClusterIP
  selector:
    app: api
  ports:
  - port: 80
    targetPort: 3000
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: ConfigMap
metadata:
  name: api-config
  namespace: default
data:
  APP_ENV: production
  DB_HOST: postgres-svc.default.svc.cluster.local
---
apiVersion: storage.k8s.io/v1
kind: StorageClass
metadata:
  name: fast-ssd
provisioner: kubernetes.io/no-provisioner
volumeBindingMode: Immediate
reclaimPolicy: Delete
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: PersistentVolumeClaim
metadata:
  name: db-pvc
  namespace: default
spec:
  storageClassName: fast-ssd
  accessModes:
  - ReadWriteOnce
  resources:
    requests:
      storage: 5Gi
